---
title: "Page 2 - Application Page Variant"
id: "mod001-se01-sec04-sp02"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec04"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---

## Context

_Describe the real-world context where this concept is applied._

## Application

_Explain how the concept is used in this specific situation._

## Outcome or implication

_Detail what happened as a result, or what the wider implications are._

## Why this is useful

_Explain why understanding this application helps the learner._

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec04-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 1 - Case Study Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec04-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 3 - Worked Example Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
